# Five Minute Forecast

> A lightweight CRM for small sales teams. Reps keep deals current daily and managers get a clear monthly forecast in minutes.

## Pages

- [Pipeline](/): Kanban board of open deals grouped by stage.
- [Analytics](/analytics): Monthly forecast, win rates, and pipeline health.
- [Contacts](/contacts): Table of people and companies linked to deals.
- [CSV Import](/import): Guided upload and column mapping for spreadsheet deals.
- [Manager Settings](/settings): Team, pipeline stages, and forecast targets.
